# Test round trip conversion with cc-tools.json  
# This tests that we can read MCP tool descriptions, convert them to Go code,
# and verify the generated code preserves the structure

# Create a simplified version with key tools from cc-tools.json
-- tools.json --
{
  "result": {
    "tools": [
      {
        "name": "Task",
        "description": "Launch a new task",
        "inputSchema": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "description": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "A short (3-5 word) description of the task"
            },
            "prompt": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "The task for the agent to perform"
            }
          },
          "required": ["description", "prompt"],
          "additionalProperties": false,
          "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "Bash",
        "description": "Run shell command",
        "inputSchema": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "command": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "The command to execute"
            },
            "timeout": {
              "type": "number",
              "description": "Optional timeout in milliseconds (max 600000)"
            }
          },
          "required": ["command"],
          "additionalProperties": false,
          "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "Batch",
        "description": "Batch execution tool",
        "inputSchema": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "invocations": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": {
                  "tool_name": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "description": "The name of the tool to invoke"
                  },
                  "input": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "additionalProperties": {},
                    "description": "The input to pass to the tool"
                  }
                },
                "required": ["tool_name", "input"],
                "additionalProperties": false
              },
              "description": "The list of tool invocations to execute"
            }
          },
          "required": ["invocations"],
          "additionalProperties": false,
          "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1
}

exec go run .. < tools.json

stdout 'type TaskTool interface'
stdout 'type BashTool interface'  
stdout 'type BatchTool interface'
stdout 'Execute\(ctx context.Context'

# Verify basic structure is preserved  
stdout 'type TaskInput struct'
stdout 'Description string.*json:"description"'
stdout 'Prompt string.*json:"prompt"'

# Check Bash tool optional fields
stdout 'Timeout.*float64.*json:"timeout,omitempty"'

# Check Batch tool nested structure
stdout 'type BatchInputInvocation struct'
stdout 'ToolName string.*json:"tool_name"'
stdout 'Input map\[string\]interface{}.*json:"input"'
